extraction_reasoning: The litigation table separates matters by direction and category: I counted only the “Against” rows—criminal proceedings against the Company (4), Directors (2), and Subsidiaries (1); statutory/regulatory proceedings against the Company (4), Directors (3), and Subsidiaries (3); and tax proceedings against the Company (24) and Subsidiaries (6). I excluded all “By” rows and excluded tax matters from the regulatory count. The quantified aggregate amount against the Company and Subsidiaries is the stated table amount of ₹3,606.56 million plus ₹359.52 million, or ₹3,966.08 million = ₹396.608 crore; the contingent-liabilities disclosure is as of June 30, 2024, but no stated Total row is provided, so no total is extracted. No company-wide top-five or top-ten customer concentration percentage is disclosed; the only relevant percentages are unrelated metrics, and no denominator-based customer concentration figure is stated. Litigation and contingent-liability tables use ₹ million; conversion is ₹ million ÷ 10 to crore (₹3,966.08 million ÷ 10 = ₹396.608 crore).
